creator: 000.fbsd@quip.cz
text:
Created attachment 248887
port update to version 20.11.1

Current version in a ports tree has many security vulnerabilities. Upstream released fixes as version 20.11.1

https://nodejs.org/en/blog/release/v20.11.1

Should be merged to quarterly after some testing.

Attached is patch to update port to version 20.11.1 build tested with "poudriere bulk -t".
